name: Agnès Varda: From Here to There
original_name: Agnès de ci de là Varda
overview: Agnès Varda takes us on a journey of discovery as she travels the globe—from Stockholm to St. Petersburg, Lisbon to Rio de Janeiro, Mexico City to Los Angeles—meeting with friends, artists, and fellow filmmakers.

trailers.title: Excerpt: Agnès Varda: From Here to There - Episode 2 (Agnès Varda, 2011)
